3066260.name: Hand Simulator: Shooter
3066260.description:
Hand Simulator Shooter — a dynamic shooter inspired by the best games in the genre, where your hands become the ultimate tools for survival and mastery. The challenges you face will make every victory even more rewarding and every defeat a valuable lesson.

You play in a "team vs. team" format, with matches starting from two players (or more, depending on the server settings). Your mission: grab a weapon at the spawn point, load it (try not to drop it), and take out the enemies. But remember: teammates are sacred — friendly fire might leave your team with nothing but moral support. If you're playing as a terrorist, you get an additional objective: planting the bomb. Be quick, though — the enemy won't wait, and the explosion might be the only thing left of your plans!
3066260.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
